name: VBus Component
description: The `VBus` Component provides status reading connectivity to solar heat energy collector controllers using VBus protocol. These devices are mainly produced by Resol, often also found under different brand names like Viessmann, Kioto, Wagner etc. The component currently supports natively the models in the table below but any device can be added via lambda by knowing [its packet structure](https://danielwippermann.github.io/resol-vbus).

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the UART hub used to connect to the device.
